title: bromus commutatus subsp. commutatus
intro: Bromus commutatus subsp. commutatus, also known as ripgut brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of this plant include relief from digestive issues, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Bromus commutatus subsp. commutatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
